rootCause: The clearUserData Playwright helper called page.goto('/') without retry logic, so transient preview server startup delays triggered net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED and caused the process-creation E2E suite to fail before tests even executed.
resolution: Added connection-refused retry handling to purgeClientState so clearUserData waits for the preview server before clearing storage, and introduced unit tests that simulate the refusal to ensure the helper keeps retrying.
